---
csl: apa-cv.csl
bibliography: ../references.bib
suppress-bibliography: true
link-citations: false
citations-hover: false
---

<!-- Publications and talks are GENERATED by ../build.py from references.bib,
     links.yaml and talks.yaml. Edit those, not the partials below. -->

{{< include _publications.md >}}

{{< include _talks.md >}}
